$description: Clinical severity tokens — IMMUTABLE, structurally forbidden from referencing brand.* tokens. Typed, not `as any`. Composed from primitives/color-ramps.json clinical_severity ramps.

normal.$description: Normal/stable — green band. No alert row created; bed-board baseline only (delivery_tier 4).

on-surface-dark.$description: Text/icon on dark surface (e.g. body bg). WCAG AAA 9.55:1 vs canvas dark.

on-surface-light.$description: Text/icon on light surface. WCAG AA 4.56:1 vs canvas light.

signal-dark.$description: Vivid status dot / border-glow on dark surface. WCAG non-text 3:1+.

signal-light.$description: Status dot / border-glow on light surface.

fill.$description: Solid chip/badge background. Shared across themes.

on-fill.$description: White text on fill. WCAG AA 4.51:1.

wash.$description: Row/card tint at 12% alpha. Decorative only.

watch.$description: Watch/advisory — amber band. Alteração relevante, ação < 2h.

on-surface-dark.$description: Text/icon on dark surface. WCAG AAA 10.63:1 vs canvas dark.

on-surface-light.$description: Text/icon on light surface. WCAG AA 4.54:1 vs canvas light.

signal-dark.$description: Vivid status dot / border-glow on dark surface. WCAG non-text 3:1+.

signal-light.$description: Status dot / border-glow on light surface.

on-fill.$description: White text on fill. WCAG AA 4.54:1.

urgent.$description: Urgent — orange band. Deterioração significativa, ação < 30 min.

on-surface-dark.$description: Text/icon on dark surface. WCAG AA 6.62:1 vs canvas dark.

on-surface-light.$description: Text/icon on light surface. WCAG AA 4.51:1 vs canvas light.

signal-dark.$description: Vivid status dot / border-glow on dark surface.

signal-light.$description: Status dot / border-glow on light surface.

on-fill.$description: White text on fill. WCAG AA 4.51:1.

critical.$description: Critical — red band. Risco iminente de vida, ação < 5 min. AAA contrast required for text roles.

on-surface-dark.$description: Text/icon on dark surface. WCAG AAA 7.68:1 vs canvas dark.

on-surface-light.$description: Text/icon on light surface. WCAG AAA 7.01:1 vs canvas light.

signal-dark.$description: Vivid status dot / border-glow on dark surface. WCAG AA ≥7.8:1 on canvas dark.

signal-light.$description: Status dot / border-glow on light surface. WCAG AA ≥5.2:1 on canvas light.

on-fill.$description: White text on fill. WCAG AAA 7.05:1.
